payload:019d4170-704f-7031-8fc6-690b118f7ac8|019d4170-705c-7ef0-aaf8-5006324c92c9|## Files
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/index.html` — root HTML entry shell (`#root`) loaded by Vite.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/main.tsx` — app bootstrap that mounts React into `#root`.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/app/App.tsx` — main UI shell + route map (`AppRoutes`), including landing page and per-product reader routes.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/registry.ts` — canonical product catalog (slug/path/metadata) for live guides.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/liveShellReaders.tsx` — maps product slugs to reader components and validates completeness.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/configuredReader.tsx` — shared reader runtime factory used by product modules.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/latam.tsx` (대표; 동일 패턴이 `mexico.tsx`, `usa.tsx`, `japan.tsx`, `china.tsx`, `europe.tsx`) — per-product reader configuration and page components.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/shared.ts` — route/path/build helpers + document/search/utility layer.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/products/components.tsx` — reusable reader UI components used across guides.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/public/generated/*/document-data.json` + `search-index.json` — generated content payloads consumed at runtime.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/scripts/prepare-pages.mjs`, `/Users/peter/GloTm/scripts/sync-generated-content.mjs` — top-level build/prepare orchestration helpers.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/LatTm/scripts/build-content.ts`, `/Users/peter/GloTm/LatTm/scripts/build-master.ts` (+ same 패턴 in `JapTm`, `EuTm`, `MexTm`, `UsaTm`, `ChaTm`) — region content-build pipeline.
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/package.json` — authoritative scripts (`dev`, `build`, `content:prepare`, etc.) and scripts entrypoint graph.

## Relationships
- `index.html` → `src/main.tsx` → `src/app/App.tsx` is the primary runtime entry chain.
- `App.tsx` uses `BrowserRouter` and routes to:
  - gateway landing route (`index`)
  - each live shell product route mapped from `liveShellReaderEntries` in `src/products/liveShellReaders.tsx`.
- `liveShellReaderEntries` merges `liveShellProducts` from `registry.ts` with reader component bundles in `liveShellReaders.tsx`.
- Each product module (`latam.tsx`, `usa.tsx`, etc.) defines doc/search URLs via `buildGeneratedContentUrl` and supplies product-specific home/chapter rendering, backed by the shared engine in `configuredReader.tsx`.
- `configuredReader.tsx` loads JSON from `public/generated/<slug>/document-data.json` and `search-index.json`, applies navigation/search/bookmark logic, and renders shared reader shells.
- Region folders (`LatTm`, `UsaTm`, `JapTm`, `ChaTm`, `EuTm`, `MexTm`) are content-generation workspaces (source markdown + build scripts) feeding the top-level generated artifacts.
- `scripts/*` at repo root coordinate generation sync/build across all regions before Vite build/start.

## Answer
This repo is a React/Vite “reader gateway” app with a shared shell and multiple region/country guide modules.  
Main app code lives in `src/` and is driven by a product registry + shared reader runtime. Runtime content is generated JSON in `public/generated` and served through per-product route mappings, rather than hardcoded static pages.

Key source directories:
- `src/` (frontend app + router + shared reader framework)
- `public/generated/` (runtime JSON content payloads)
- `scripts/` (root content sync/build orchestration)
- `LatTm/`, `UsaTm/`, `JapTm/`, `ChaTm/`, `EuTm/`, `MexTm/` (per-region content pipelines and source docs)

Likely entrypoints:
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/index.html`
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/main.tsx`
- `/Users/peter/GloTm/src/app/App.tsx`
- build orchestration via `/Users/peter/GloTm/package.json` scripts (`predev`, `prebuild`, `content:prepare`) and region script `content:prepare` targets.

## Next steps
- `Ready to proceed`
